description: As an Emergency Medicine educator creating a visual aid for residents based on the AHA/ACC 2021 Guidelines, create a clinical decision flowchart for Acute Chest Pain Triage using the logic provided in ~/Desktop/chest_pain_pathway.txt. The diagram must include two pages: Page 1 titled 'Triage Algorithm' mapping the decision logic with color-coded risk levels (RED for high risk/STEMI/NSTEMI, ORANGE for moderate risk/Observation, and GREEN for low risk/Discharge), and Page 2 titled 'HEART Score' containing a reference table of the five HEART score components found in the text file. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/chest_pain_triage.drawio and export Page 1 as a PNG image to ~/Desktop/chest_pain_triage.png.
